rationale: The proposed change to Tax Code §11.13(b) homestead exemption amounts has no bearing on Elec. Code §13.001, which governs voter registration eligibility criteria such as age, citizenship, and residency.
quote: To be eligible for registration as a voter in this state, a person must:
_note: No conflict; Elec. Code §13.001 addresses voter registration eligibility and is unrelated to property tax homestead exemptions.
